original_query: with inv as (select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy        ,stdev,mean, case mean when 0 then null else stdev/mean end cov  from(select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy             ,stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) stdev,avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) mean       from inventory           ,item           ,warehouse           ,date_dim       where inv_item_sk = i_item_sk         and inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk         and inv_date_sk = d_date_sk         and d_year =2000         and i_category IN ('Books', 'Men')         and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100         and inv_quantity_on_hand between 376 and 576       group by w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy) foo  where case mean when 0 then 0 else stdev/mean end > 1) select inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean, inv1.cov         ,inv2.w_warehouse_sk,inv2.i_item_sk,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov from inv inv1,inv inv2 where inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk   and inv1.w_warehouse_sk =  inv2.w_warehouse_sk   and inv1.d_moy=1   and inv2.d_moy=1+1 order by inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean,inv1.cov         ,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov ;
rewritten_query:
WITH inv AS (
  SELECT 
    w_warehouse_name,
    w_warehouse_sk,
    i_item_sk,
    d_moy,
    stdev,
    mean, 
    CASE mean WHEN 0 THEN NULL ELSE stdev/mean END cov
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      MAX(w_warehouse_name) as w_warehouse_name,
      w_warehouse_sk,
      i_item_sk,
      d_moy,
      stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) stdev,
      avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) mean
    FROM inventory
    JOIN item ON inv_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN warehouse ON inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON inv_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND d_moy IN (1, 2)
      AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Men')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 AND 100
      AND inv_quantity_on_hand BETWEEN 376 AND 576
    GROUP BY w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk, d_moy
  ) foo
  WHERE mean != 0 AND stdev/mean > 1
)
SELECT 
  inv1.w_warehouse_sk,
  inv1.i_item_sk,
  inv1.d_moy,
  inv1.mean,
  inv1.cov,
  inv2.w_warehouse_sk,
  inv2.i_item_sk,
  inv2.d_moy,
  inv2.mean,
  inv2.cov
FROM inv inv1
JOIN inv inv2 ON inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk
  AND inv1.w_warehouse_sk = inv2.w_warehouse_sk
WHERE inv1.d_moy = 1
  AND inv2.d_moy = 2
ORDER BY 
  inv1.w_warehouse_sk,
  inv1.i_item_sk,
  inv1.d_moy,
  inv1.mean,
  inv1.cov,
  inv2.d_moy,
  inv2.mean,
  inv2.cov;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Simplified the CASE expression in the WHERE clause from 'case mean when 0 then 0 else stdev/mean end > 1' to 'mean != 0 AND stdev/mean > 1' which is logically equivalent but more efficient.
Added filter 'd_moy IN (1, 2)' to the subquery to reduce the amount of data processed, since the main query only uses these two months.
Changed implicit joins (comma-separated tables) to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better optimization.
Simplified the GROUP BY clause by removing w_warehouse_name and using MAX(w_warehouse_name) instead, since w_warehouse_name is functionally dependent on w_warehouse_sk.
